name: project-tasks
description: Capture project tasks inline, store them in SQLite, dispatch work, and generate changelogs.

interface.shortDescription: Track tasks, fixes, todos, and changelog entries from chat.
interface.longDescription: Project Tasks captures task:, fix:, and todo: requests into a SQLite-backed project task list. It supports dependency tracking, task review, changelog generation, and host-aware helper paths for Claude Code and Codex.
defaultPrompt: task: add tests for the parser edge cases
